---
title: "Rugby Affective Visualization"
author: "Leah Pettway"
date: "03/12/26"
format: html
---

## Initial Set-up
```{r}
#| label: Set-up

library(tidyverse) #loading in initial packages necessary for visualizations
library(janitor)
library(ggridges)
library(GGally)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(plotly)
library(heatmaply)
install.packages("wesanderson") # installing a color package
library(wesanderson)
install.packages("ggcorrplot")
library(ggcorrplot) 
install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("javiereliomedina/ggrugby")
library(ggrugby) # loading in ggrugby package for field shape

my_data <- read_csv("/Users/leahpettway/ENVS-193DS/github/affective_visualization/Rugby-Affective-Visualization/data/Personal_data.csv") # loading in personal data 

```

## Cleaning Data

```{r}
#| label: cleaning personal data


set.seed(123) # ensuring the same output of numbers occurs each time the code is ran.

# Clean data and create formation
my_data_pitch <- my_data |>
  clean_names() |> # cleaning names so they are all lowercase and remove spaces
  drop_na() |> # dropping any n/a values in the data
  mutate(
    # spread players across pitch width
    width_position = seq(5, 65, length.out = n()),
    
    # formation positions
    x_position = ifelse(
      rugby_practice_day_yes_or_no == "yes",
      # attacking backline behind right 10m line
      58 + 8 * sin(width_position / 10),
      
      # defensive line behind left 10m line
      42
    ),
    y_position = width_position 
  )
my_data_clean <- my_data |> # create clean data object for other visualizations
  clean_names() |> # cleaning names so they are all lowercase and remove spaces
  drop_na() # dropping n/a values from the data set


```

## Rugby Pitch scatterplot
```{r}
#| label: Rugby field plot

ggplot() + # create general plot 
  rugby_pitch() + # rugby_pitch creates field 
  geom_point( # create point geometry
    data = my_data_pitch, # using my_data_pitch for data frame
    aes(
      x = x_position, # positions set in the cleaning stage for x-axis
      y = y_position, # positions set in the cleaning stage for y-axis
      size = amount_of_protein_grams, # size is dependent on protein amount
      color = rugby_practice_day_yes_or_no # color will distiguish if it was a rugby day
    ),
    alpha = 0.9 # making the points a bit transparent
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c( # setting each category a color
    "yes" = "orange",
    "no" = "black"
  )) +
  coord_fixed(xlim = c(0, 100), ylim = c(0, 70)) + # fixed limits to keep points on within the right space
  labs(
    title = "Protein Intake on Rugby vs Non-Rugby Days", # adding in title 
    subtitle = "Attack Behind Right 10m | Defense Behind Left 10m", # labeling the two sides
    color = "Practice Day", # set color or be based on practice day
    size = "Protein Intake (g)" # size will be determined by protein intale
  ) +
  theme_void() # setting a theme

```
